summary: Iteration 13 — Frontend-only validation of the 8 new content/feature scenarios on https://software-staging.preview.emergentagent.com (PHP/MySQL/Bootstrap). ALL 8 spec scenarios PASS. (1) reviews.php: reviews-summary card present, reviews-overall='4.6', 5 distribution progress-bar elements (77/14/5/1/4%), rating-categories table has 4 rows (Recommend This Company/Would Buy Again/Customer Service/Price Satisfaction), reviews-list has exactly 10 review cards on page 1 (each with initials avatar, Verified badge, location, date, 5-star row, text, 'Purchased:' line), reviews-range='Showing 1–10 of 50 reviews'. (2) reviews pagination: reviews-page-1..5 all present, Previous disabled on p=1, ?p=5 shows 'Showing 41–50 of 50' with Next disabled, ?p=99 returns HTTP 200 and clamps to 41-50 (no error). (3) blog.php: page-head shows 'UCODE SOFTTECH Blog', blog-search input + blog-search-btn present, blog-grid renders 10 post cards on page 1, '50 articles' count present, blog-page-1..5 navigation works (?p=3 navigated successfully); ?q=Excel returns 2 cards, ALL titles contain 'Excel' ('Excel 2021: The Functions That Changed Everything', 'Five Excel 2021 Tricks for Faster Reporting'); ?q=zzzz renders blog-no-results card with 'View All Articles' link to blog.php. (4) blog-post.php?id=1: renders title + 'Key takeaways' list + category CTA (category.php?slug=windows), CTA target returns HTTP 200. (5) about-us.php: about-hero contains inline SVG logo + 'About UCODE SOFTTECH' title text, about-checklist card contains 6 bi-icon rows, about-stats shows 50,000+ / 100% / 15–30min / 4.9/5 strings, about-why-choose section contains 6 feature cards (12 col containers verified), about-browse-btn → shop.php and about-compare-btn → category.php?slug=office both present. (6) page.php?slug=why-choose-us: renders 2 tables, 3 alerts, 'How we keep prices low' heading present, support channels (Live Chat/Email/Phone/Help Center) all in body, 3 links to reviews.php found. (7) Links: footer 'Customer Reviews' anchor href='reviews.php'; trustbar (top strip) contains '4.6/5' text AND a reviews.php link. (8) Regression: shop.php?cat[]=office&ver[]=2024&os[]=Mac → shop-result-count '2 products found'; dark mode toggle flips html[data-bs-theme]='dark' on both reviews.php and blog.php and the layouts render legibly (verified via screenshots).
critical_code_review_comments: reviews.php correctly uses server-side clamping (min($page, $pages)) — ?p=99 silently clamps to last page (5) rather than 404/error. Good UX. PHP-PDO query uses inline LIMIT/OFFSET cast through (int) — safe, no SQL injection risk.

blog.php search uses prepared LIKE with parameter binding ('%' . $q . '%') — safe against injection. Newest-first ordering uses STR_TO_DATE('%b %e, %Y') which works because the seeded date strings are well-formed; consider migrating blog_posts.date to a real DATE column to avoid runtime parsing cost on every list query.
Star distribution row in reviews-summary uses three color buckets (>=4 success, 3 warning, <3 danger) — accessible and visually consistent.

Rating distribution percentages (77/14/5/1/4) and the 5,523 total are hardcoded display values in reviews.php (acknowledged as mocked stats). Recommendation: when the marketing decides to make these dynamic, derive from SELECT rating, COUNT(*) FROM reviews GROUP BY rating with a normalization step — schema already supports it.

about-us.php hero uses render_logo() shared helper, consistent with the rest of the app. The 'Why Choose Perpetual Licenses?' grid renders 6 cards inside about-why-choose — selector check counted 12 col containers (6 cards + their padding wrappers), which is expected Bootstrap structure.

page.php?slug=why-choose-us pulls content from the pages table — content includes embedded HTML tables and Bootstrap .alert markup; sanitization here relies on trusting the admin-authored body. If non-admins ever get write access, run through a HTML allowlist (e.g., HTMLPurifier).
Trustbar 4.6/5 element is now correctly a clickable link to reviews.php — improves discoverability and matches the footer 'Customer Reviews' link target.
seed_data_creation: None — no test data was created this iteration (read-only verification of reviews/blog/about/why-choose-us/links/shop-filter/dark-mode).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new content overhaul scenarios verified end-to-end. Key data-testids confirmed live: reviews-summary, reviews-overall, rating-categories, reviews-list, reviews-range, reviews-pagination, reviews-page-1..5, blog-search, blog-search-btn, blog-grid, blog-pagination, blog-page-1..5, blog-no-results, blog-card-{id}, about-hero, about-checklist, about-stats, about-why-choose, about-browse-btn, about-compare-btn. The 50-row reviews table and 50-row blog_posts seeding are intact. Searching blog for 'Excel' returns exactly 2 hits (Excel 2021 articles) — useful sanity check for next time. blog-post.php CTA for id=1 currently targets category.php?slug=windows; other post IDs map to different categories (office-pc/office-mac/microsoft-project/bitdefender/antivirus etc.) all of which return 200. Dark mode is preserved across reviews.php and blog.php via the global theme-toggle. trustbar '4.6/5 (4,722+ Reviews)' is now clickable → reviews.php (verified). No regressions detected in shop filters (office+2024+Mac still = 2 products).
